assertions.title: Only prefixed env vars are recognized

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with only SEARCH_PAPER_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL set
steps.expected: CLI uses SEARCH_PAPER_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL and returns one result

steps.action: Run core search with SEARCH_PAPER_CORE_API_KEY explicitly empty
steps.expected: Explicitly empty prefixed variables stay empty and omit auth headers

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE pointing to an explicit env file containing comments, blank lines, export syntax, quoted values, and one malformed line
steps.expected: Explicit file wins over cwd/repo discovery, quoted/export values load, malformed line warns without crashing
steps.observed: exit 0; server observed email=explicit@example.com; stderr warning present=True

steps.action: Run sources --format json from a cwd containing its own .env
steps.expected: cwd .env wins over repository-root .env and search uses cwd-provided local base URL/email

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE set to a missing path while cwd .env exists
steps.expected: CLI warns, does not crash, and does not fall back to cwd/repo env files
steps.observed: exit 0; total=0; stderr='warning: explicit env file not found: /root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/foundation-followup/env-precedence/work/val008-missing-explicit/missing.env'; local server hit=False

steps.action: Run sources --source ieee --format json using the explicit env file
steps.expected: Quoted/export IEEE key parses successfully and JSON stdout remains valid

steps.action: Run sources --format json with an explicit env file containing a malformed line
steps.expected: Warning is emitted only on stderr and stdout remains parseable JSON

assertions.title: Secrets are never echoed in diagnostics

steps.action: Run sources --format json with sentinel secrets in both env vars and a malformed cwd .env line
steps.expected: CLI exits cleanly and neither stdout nor stderr contains the sentinel secret value

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
